news.title: Exxon Mobil CEO expects higher oil prices due to Iran war: ‘The market hasn’t seen the full impact’
news.description: Oil prices have soared on the risk of escalation and then plunged on hopes for peace before repeating the cycle.

news.title: Trump tells Congress hostilities in Iran 'have terminated' as war powers deadline hits
news.description: Trump said there "is tremendous discord" among Iran's leaders, which has complicated efforts to end the war that the United States began in late February.

news.title: Trump says government gave 'final' bailout proposal for Spirit Airlines as liquidation looms
news.description: Talks with bondholders for a government bailout this week have not yet yielded a deal.

news.title: S&P 500 closes at a new record to usher in May as oil prices cool and Apple rises: Live updates
news.description: The S&P 500 rose to a fresh all-time intraday high on Friday, boosted by Apple shares, while oil prices fell as a new month of trading got underway.

news.title: Jobs and earnings will dominate the first full week of May. Here's what's ahead
news.description: A solid jobs report could alleviate fears of a weakening U.S. economy, which some recent signals have indicated.

news.title: Trump says he's raising EU auto tariffs to 25% without clarifying how
news.description: The Supreme Court struck down Trump's "reciprocal" tariffs earlier this year, and Europe warned that its trade deal with Washington could be in jeopardy.

news.title: Engine trouble ahead? How the Strait of Hormuz standoff threatens luxury auto giants
news.description: Supercar engines rely on base oils because they can withstand extreme heat, high revs and intense pressure.

news.title: Pirro keeps pressure on Fed's Powell despite dropping probe
news.description: The U.S. attorney is expected to imminently appeal a ruling blocking her investigation of the Fed's cost overruns.

news.title: Trump says he will hike tariffs on EU cars to 25%
news.description: The current level of tariffs charged on goods entering the US from the EU is 15%, under a deal negotiated last July.

news.title: The Real Greek rescued by Cote Brasserie-owner
news.description: All but nine of the Mediterranean chain's 28 outlets are being taken over by the family-owned Karali group.

news.title: Crayola toys recalled over possible asbestos contamination
news.description: People should stop using the products immediately and keep out of the reach of children, the government says.

news.title: No evidence of widespread fuel price-gouging, watchdog says
news.description: Profit margins were "broadly unchanged" between February and March, the UK's competition watchdog says.

news.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
news.description: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

news.title: Will AI lead to more accurate opinion polls?
news.description: It's cheaper and faster to collect people's opinions using AI, but will it make polls more accurate?

news.title: 'There were letters I didn't want to open': Rise in unpaid debt court cases
news.description: The number of county court judgements rose by 17.5% in the first quarter of this year compared to last, data suggests.

news.title: Spotify adds 'Verified' badges to distinguish human artists from AI
news.description: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.

news.title: The market isn't grading all Big Tech earnings the same — here's why
news.description: After a big week of mega-cap tech earnings, investors are starting to differentiate AI tech winners from those still proving themselves.

news.title: Apple's stock gains as company execs cite iPhone, Mac demand in boosting guidance
news.description: On its quarterly earnings call, Apple said revenue growth in the current quarter would be between 14% and 17%, well above analysts' estimates.

news.title: Roblox shares plummet 18% as child safety measures weigh on bookings
news.description: Roblox is facing over 140 federal lawsuits accusing it of failing to prevent child exploitation, and last month settled with Alabama and West Virginia.

news.title: Atlassian stock soars 29% after earnings show strong cloud, data center growth
news.description: Atlassian's stock has been hit hard in the "SaaS-pocalypse" sweeping software names as AI threatens to disrupt their business models.

news.title: Apple earnings, DHS shutdown, 'Ozempic breath' and more in Morning Squawk
news.description: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

news.title: Elon Musk billionaires bill supporters draw progressive challengers in Delaware
news.description: Musk, whose record pay package was in legal limbo in Delaware, relocated Tesla's incorporation out of state during the spat.

news.title: Pentagon tech chief says Anthropic is still blacklisted, but Mythos is a separate issue
news.description: The DOD announced it has entered into agreements with seven other AI companies.

news.title: The Tech Download: Chip stocks surge in ‘historic’ month as investors’ AI buildout concerns ease
news.description: March saw many chip stocks drop amid concerns over the AI buildout, but their fortunes have reversed in April.

chinaNews.title: 至少六家机构大幅上调闪迪目标价
chinaNews.description: 闪迪周五收高8.25%，股价创历史新高，成交255.52亿美元。 至少六家机构大幅上调闪迪目标价，最高看涨至2000美元，反映市场对其增长预期显著强化，情绪明显转向乐观。

chinaNews.title: 5月2日热门中概股多数下跌 慧荣科技涨7.19%，蔚来跌7.51%
chinaNews.description: 5月2日热门中概股多数下跌，纳斯达克中国金龙指数（HXC）收跌0.59%。 上涨个股（按市值从高到低）：台积电涨0.41%，网易涨0.40%，日月光半导体涨0.57%，携程涨0.02%...

chinaNews.title: 5月2日收盘：美股涨跌不一 纳指突破25000点创历史新高
chinaNews.description: 北京时间5月2日凌晨，美股周五收盘涨跌不一，纳指与标普500指数再创历史新高。三大股指本周均录得涨幅，纳指首次收在25000点之上。苹果引领科技股上涨。油价下跌。

chinaNews.title: 美国多家石油巨头CEO警告称能源市场正逼近悬崖边缘
chinaNews.description: 美国最大的石油公司警告称，霍尔木兹海峡关闭时间越长，全球原油市场越可能逼近价格上行的拐点。 埃克森美孚、雪佛龙和康菲石油本周表示，该水道多关闭一天...

chinaNews.title: 原油：WTI小幅下挫 市场憧憬美伊谈判取得进展
chinaNews.description: 油价小幅走低，市场交投清淡。美伊和平谈判陷入僵局但仍未完全破裂，一些交易员在周末前削减风险敞口。 西德克萨斯州中质油（WTI）期货价格下跌，但连续第二周录得周涨幅...
